metadata.name: NetBird Network Router
metadata.description: Creates a NetBird network router and targets either a single peer or a peer group.

items.name: router_masquerade
items.title: Masquerade
items.description: Masquerade routed traffic on the selected router peer.

items.name: router_metric
items.title: Metric
items.description: Router metric. Lower values have higher priority.

items.name: router_target_mode
items.title: Target Mode
items.description: Route through a single peer or a peer group.

items.name: network_name
items.title: Network Name
items.description: Existing NetBird network name for the parent network lookup.

items.name: peer_name
items.title: Peer Name
items.description: Existing NetBird peer name for the router peer lookup.

items.name: peer_group_names
items.title: Peer Group Names
items.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird group names for router groups.
